testsuite.name: com.runtheworld.server.ApplicationTest
testsuite.system-out: 23:53:58.855 [DefaultDispatcher-worker-2 @call-context#3] INFO io.ktor.test -- No ktor.deployment.watch patterns specified, automatic reload is not active. 23:53:59.384 [DefaultDispatcher-worker-2 @call-context#3] DEBUG Exposed -- CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS profiles (uid VARCHAR(64) NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY, username VARCHAR(64) NOT NULL, display_name VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL, color_hex VARCHAR(16) NOT NULL, total_area_km2 DOUBLE PRECISION DEFAULT 0.0 NOT NULL, run_count INT DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL, CONSTRAINT chk_profiles_signed_integer_run_count CHECK (run_count BETWEEN -2147483648 AND 2147483647)) 23:53:59.385 [DefaultDispatcher-worker-2 @call-context#3] DEBUG Exposed -- CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS runs (id VARCHAR(64) NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY, user_id VARCHAR(64) NOT
